nasb.text: and said, “Sir, we remember that when He was still alive that deceiver said, ‘After three days I am to rise again.’

esv.text: and said, “Sir, we remember how that impostor said, while he was still alive, ‘After three days I will rise.’

cnv.text: “大人，我們想起那個騙子，生前說過：‘三天之後，我要復活。’

ccb.text: “总督大人，我们记得那个骗子生前曾说，‘三天之后，我必复活。’

csbs.text: 说：“大人，我们想起当那个迷惑人的还活着时曾经说过：‘在第三天我要复活。’
